response.justification: The candidate lacks mandatory C++ experience on Windows and has no demonstrated background in capital markets, fixed income, or investment banking domains — instead, their career is centered on web, mobile, and open-source projects using TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang, with no evidence of SQL Server/Oracle or Windows-based financial system development.
strengths: Strong full-stack engineering experience across multiple languages and platforms
Proven track record in open-source contributions and technical leadership
Excellent communication skills demonstrated through workshops and talks
concerns: No measurable C++ experience on Windows platform as required
Zero evidence of fixed income, capital markets, or investment banking domain exposure
Primary tech stack (TypeScript, Node.js, DLang) does not align with core C++/SQL Server mandate

key_factors.factor: SQL experience unverified and not in target databases
